# gastown_rig (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hq_path` (String) Path to the Gas Town HQ directory.
- `name` (String) Name of the rig (used as identifier).
- `repo` (String) Git repository URL or local path for the rig.

### Optional

- `max_polecats` (Number) Maximum number of polecats (workers) for the rig. Defaults to 3.
- `runtime` (String) Runtime environment for the rig. Defaults to 'claude'.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the rig resource.
- `prefix` (String) Beads prefix assigned to this rig (read from gt rig status).
- `status` (String) Current operational status of the rig.
